title: ilex cornuta
intro: Ilex cornuta, also known as the Chinese holly or Chinese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves and branches of the Ilex cornuta plant have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels and reducing blood pressure, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ilex cornuta is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in formulas to treat various health conditions.
